name: Verify Graph Representations page content is visible
fullName: features/graph.feature#Verify Graph Representations page content is visible

steps.name: Given The user is in the "Graph Representations" page
When The user verifies the content in Graph Representations page
Then The user should see the content of "Graph Representations" page
